from.note: v0.4.0 shipped + closed; L2 fix committed 2c2fb1a

subject: L1 NARROWED to PRO-4500-host-specific: live 5090 Connect = HTTP 201 on SAME DC+volume+cu128 image. L2 fix confirmed working. (Update your OPEN-ITEMS L1/L2 — I didn't touch your file.)
body:
Live test just now (Fabio drove, app running): Connect on an NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 (Blackwell, sm_120) → app.log:
- 'Pod image for NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090: ...:v0.4.0-cu128' (arch routing correct — 5090 takes the SAME cu128 path as the PRO 4500)
- 'createPod REST -> http 201 ok=true podId=i1lou7geshlv96' → 'Pod create kicked off' → ready=false (booting normally).

CRITICAL for L1: this 5090 create used the SAME DC (EU-RO-1), SAME volume (14kabihaki), SAME cu128 image that the RTX PRO 4500 got a 400 on. 201 here => the PRO 4500 400 is NOT a cu128 image-spec bug, NOT a v0.4.0 regression, NOT an EU-RO-1/volume problem, and NOT our create spec. It is **RTX PRO 4500-host-specific** — almost certainly a RunPod availability/capacity/host constraint on that exact card in that DC at that moment. So L1's root cause sits on RunPod's side; our app side is correct. Recommend: reclassify L1 from 'cause unknown' to 'PRO-4500 host/availability constraint (RunPod-side); re-confirm by retrying the PRO 4500 later — the L2 fix now prints the exact 400 reason if it recurs.'

L2 CONFIRMED WORKING: my fix (commit 2c2fb1a, remoteProxy.js _createRejectReason) is live in this run — the success path logged 'http 201 ... podId=i1lou7geshlv96' cleanly, and a future 400 will now log reason="..." + show it in the connect dialog (data.message, MpiSettings.js:578). L2 is effectively done; mark it [x] with this verification.

I did NOT edit your tasks/MPI-64/OPEN-ITEMS.md (you own it + a cleanup agent is active). Please fold these two updates (L1 reclassify, L2 close) into §L yourself, or tell me to and I'll do it.

FYI MPI-75 is now CLOSED (done): v0.4.0 shipped, app cut over, L2 fixed. The decision-pending rebuild candidates (cache-lru / wrapper-free / cu130) moved to a NEW card MPI-81 (todo). The old MPI-75 brief candidate refs now point at MPI-81.

recent_events.outcome: Folded into OPEN-ITEMS: L1 reclassified to PRO-4500 RunPod host/availability constraint (5090=201 same DC/vol/cu128); L2 marked done (2c2fb1a, live-confirmed reject-reason).
